python:
from yolobit import *
button_a.on_pressed = None
button_b.on_pressed = None
button_a.on_pressed_ab = button_b.on_pressed_ab = -1
from mqtt import *
import music
import time

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__V1_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):

  if th_C3_B4ng_tin != 'UNKNOWN':
    display.set_all('#00ff00')
    display.scroll(th_C3_B4ng_tin)
    music.play(music.NYAN, wait=True)
  else:
    display.set_all('#ff0000')
    display.scroll(th_C3_B4ng_tin)
    music.play(music.RINGTONE, wait=True)

if True:
  display.scroll('GloryMU - FaceID ')
  mqtt.connect_wifi('AITechLab', 'ML4u@khmt')
  mqtt.connect_broker(server='mqtt.ohstem.vn', port=1883, username='GloryMU', password='')
  mqtt.on_receive_message('V1', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__V1_)

while True:
  mqtt.check_message()
  time.sleep_ms(100)
  time.sleep_ms(10)
name: DADN
